mechanism_narrative: A positive 3-month change in FEDFUNDS raises the discount rate applied to equity cash flows; higher FEDFUNDS momentum predicts negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if triggered FEDFUNDS momentum signals have positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of walk-forward observations or Rank IC is below 0.03 over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS crosses above 4.5%, restrictive policy reduces valuation multiples and risk appetite; the level shock predicts negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if S&P 500 20-day forward returns following FEDFUNDS crossings above 4.5% are not lower than unconditional returns at p < 0.10 in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: A higher 3-month growth rate in RSAFS signals stronger household demand and near-term revenue momentum; rising RSAFS growth predicts positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if the top tercile of RSAFS 3-month growth does not outperform the bottom tercile in 20-day S&P 500 returns over at least 60% of rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Positive RSAFS growth combined with stable UNRATE identifies demand supported by labor income; this joint condition predicts positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
regime_hint: late-cycle expansion with intact labor income
failure_condition: Reject if the joint RSAFS-positive and UNRATE-stable condition produces 20-day S&P 500 returns below the unconditional median in more than 50% of walk-forward triggers.

mechanism_narrative: A negative 3-month change in INDPRO signals weakening production and operating leverage pressure; falling INDPRO predicts negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if INDPRO downturn triggers are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of observations or have no negative return spread versus baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in UNRATE greater than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months signals deteriorating labor demand and recession risk; this predicts negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if UNRATE rise triggers fail to predict below-median 60-day S&P 500 returns in at least 55% of walk-forward cases or if coefficient sign is positive.

mechanism_narrative: HOUST above 1800 with positive 3-month momentum signals strong housing-linked demand and durable-goods spillovers; this predicts positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST high-and-rising triggers generate 60-day S&P 500 returns below unconditional returns with p < 0.10 or positive hit rate below 50%.

mechanism_narrative: High FEDFUNDS combined with rising CPIAUCSL signals inflation pressure under restrictive policy, compressing equity valuations; this joint condition predicts negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint high-FEDFUNDS and rising-CPIAUCSL trigger produces nonnegative 5-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of walk-forward observations.
